criteria.criterion: The plan-review sidecar payload persists each pass-4 coaching note with its full shape — move_id, move_name, subject, finding_refs, and the rendered coaching prose — not just {move_id, finding_refs}. Oracle: a unit test driving build_payload with a verdict whose coaching[] carries the full shape and asserting all five fields survive in the emitted payload.
The code-review sidecar payload persists pass-4 coaching losslessly (full record shape). Oracle: a unit test driving build_payload with a full-shape coaching note and asserting the fields survive.
make lint && make typecheck && make test pass.
